content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 23 focused on optimizing agent context management, refining the settings UI, and performing extensive dependency updates across the framework. Key improvements include reducing prompt bloat to support longer context windows and finalizing Android mobile integration.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Context Optimization and Performance**
*   Reduced prompt bloat in the action-planner and reflection pipeline to prevent long-context capacity issues [#7013](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7013).

**UI/UX and Mobile Enhancements**
*   Polished the settings UI, including provider dropdown sizing, model picker layout, and header adjustments [#7059](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7059).
*   Completed default role wiring for the Android application, including SMS and messaging service integration [#7052](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7052).

**Dependency and Infrastructure Maintenance**
*   Performed widespread dependency updates, including `uuid` v14 [#7046](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7046), `gymnasium` v1.3.0 [#7058](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7058), `commander` v14 [#7057](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7057), and `typescript` v6 [#7042](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7042).
*   Updated testing frameworks (`vitest` v4) [#7043](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7043) and upgraded Node.js to v24 [#7048](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7048).
*   Bounced various cargo and npm/yarn groups to ensure security and compatibility across the repository [#7044](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7044), [#7045](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7045), [#7047](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7047).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES

**Decentralized Agent Communication**
*   [#7073](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7073): Proposed a feature for trustless Agent-to-Agent deals using local ZK proofs to enable private state verification without leaking underlying data.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
